tasks.blocked_on: Draft E2E smoke path is unblocked and uses no paid image API, but draft assets are intentionally blocked by `image_review_gate` for live posting. OpenAI API paid generation remains intentionally disabled for normal operation. Real live posting still requires Meta-fetchable image URLs, Meta app credentials, and image review approval JSON; the missing asset URL/remote/default+EN credential values are now surfaced by Studio Setup / `scripts/setup_credentials.py` instead of being chat-only blockers. Remote exposure still requires `MAIS_STUDIO_TOKEN` and a safe network path; tokenless non-loopback bind is blocked and token-less local mode still requires CSRF. Automatic due-post execution requires scheduler install/enable via `scripts/setup_scheduler.py`; Launch Report warns/blocks when scheduled posts lack an installed scheduler. No static-site substitute is used for Mais operations; credentials, posting controls, review JSON, candidates, logs, and secrets remain in Mais API/Studio or local files only. Generated Dais App repo migration is intentionally deferred until Proto stage completion. KDP/Amazon販売は HTML/Markdown/manifest/PDF/spread review export まで実装済みで、24+ pages accumulation、real-image manuscript QA、final page count 後の official KDP cover template verification は未実施。Fully automated paid LLM/vision execution remains sealed behind future explicit opt-in.
